reviews.comment:
Es el único lugar que encontramos las 24 hs abierto. Cosa difícil en Bariloche

(Translated by Google)
It's the only place we found open 24 hours a day. That's a difficult thing in Bariloche.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario. Esperamos su pronta visita

reviews.comment:
Un servicio excepcional, se quedó mi camioneta en el camino del desierto y me gestionaron la grua con el ACA y mecánico un sábado.

(Translated by Google)
Exceptional service, my truck broke down on the desert road and they arranged for a tow truck with the ACA and a mechanic on a Saturday.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su opinión Juan Pablo

reviews.comment:
Pocos playeros o poca gana de atender. Siempre que tengo que cargar ahi es la muerte. Tienen varios surtidores pero el playero labura a reglamento

(Translated by Google)
There are either too few attendants or they're not very helpful. It's always a nightmare when I have to fill up there. They have several pumps, but the attendant is just following the rules.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia. Esperamos su pronta visita

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su opinión Nicolas

reviews.comment:
El café vale $1.800, pero si decís q es para llevar te cobran $3.100…y no avisan … unos estafadores !!!!

(Translated by Google)
The coffee costs $1,800, but if you say it's to go they charge you $3,100... and they don't even warn you... scammers!

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia. El café vale lo mismo para consumir en el lugar o para llevar. Saludos
